turns.user_message: I just feel heavy and slow today. My head is foggy and I can't focus.
This heavy feeling hasn't gone away for weeks now. I'm constantly tired and my mind feels blank.
The heaviness is crushing me and I can't shake it off. My thoughts are completely stuck and I feel numb all over.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by describing a physical feeling. This has been going on for a while.
